name: Envista Holdings Corp
summary: Envista Holdings Corp (NVST) is a dental products company offering a broad portfolio of dental consumables, equipment, and services. The company serves dental professionals globally with products spanning orthodontics, implants, imaging, treatment units, and infection prevention. Envista operates through multiple brands and segments focused on improving patient outcomes and dental practice efficiency.
